title: Shared Medical Vocabulary Immune & Inflammatory Core v1

items.label: systemic lupus erythematosus
items.ambiguity_notes: SLE should not automatically expand to lupus nephritis.

items.label: rheumatoid arthritis
items.ambiguity_notes: RA requires exact abbreviation matching.

items.label: dermatomyositis
items.ambiguity_notes: DM can conflict with diabetes mellitus.

items.label: Hashimoto thyroiditis
zh_synonyms: 慢性淋巴细胞性甲状腺炎
items.ambiguity_notes: Cross-reference from endocrine core; do not duplicate.
expected_terms: 慢性淋巴细胞性甲状腺炎

items.label: Graves disease
items.ambiguity_notes: Cross-reference from endocrine core; do not duplicate.

items.label: psoriatic arthritis
items.ambiguity_notes: Psoriasis and psoriatic arthritis should not collapse.

items.label: vasculitis
items.ambiguity_notes: Umbrella vasculitis should not imply a subtype.

items.label: ANCA-associated vasculitis
zh_synonyms: 抗中性粒细胞胞浆抗体相关性血管炎
items.ambiguity_notes: ANCA disease should not be triggered by ANCA biomarker alone.
expected_terms: 抗中性粒细胞胞浆抗体相关性血管炎

items.label: inflammatory bowel disease
items.ambiguity_notes: IBD is an umbrella term; do not auto-expand to Crohn disease or ulcerative colitis.

items.label: asthma
items.ambiguity_notes: Asthma and COPD are distinct airway diseases.

items.label: eczema
items.ambiguity_notes: Eczema is broader than atopic dermatitis.

items.label: chronic rhinosinusitis
items.ambiguity_notes: CRS can mean chronic rhinosinusitis or cytokine release syndrome.

items.label: psoriasis
items.ambiguity_notes: Psoriasis should not automatically equal psoriatic arthritis.

items.label: multiple sclerosis
items.ambiguity_notes: MS is high risk abbreviation.

items.label: neuromyelitis optica spectrum disorder
items.preferred_zh: 视神经脊髓炎谱系疾病
expected_terms: 视神经脊髓炎谱系疾病

items.label: dendritic cell
items.ambiguity_notes: DC is high risk abbreviation.

items.label: C-reactive protein
items.ambiguity_notes: Cross-reference from cardiovascular core; do not duplicate.

items.label: tumor necrosis factor alpha
items.ambiguity_notes: TNF is a short cytokine token.

items.label: interferon gamma
items.ambiguity_notes: IFN is broad and context-sensitive.

items.label: rheumatoid factor
items.ambiguity_notes: RF is a short token.

items.label: antineutrophil cytoplasmic antibody
items.preferred_zh: 抗中性粒细胞胞浆抗体
items.ambiguity_notes: ANCA biomarker should not automatically equal AAV.
expected_terms: 抗中性粒细胞胞浆抗体

items.label: inflammation
items.ambiguity_notes: Cross-reference from cardiovascular phenotype/process; not a disease.

items.label: cytokine storm
items.ambiguity_notes: CRS can also mean chronic rhinosinusitis.

ambiguity_terms.reason: short or ambiguous immune/inflammatory token; exact match or context required
